MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-23-671595 WITH CASE CGC-23-604803
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Eric B. Johnson; Law Offices of Eric Brian Johnson; 206-489-5530; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Barcelino Continental Corp.
Aaron J. Ver; Perkins Coie LLP; 415-344-7000; appearing as counsel for defendant Good Post, LLC.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-23-671595 WITH CASE CGC-23-604803 is DENIED.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric B. Johnson (206)489-5530 of Law Offices of Eric Brian Johnson appearing via Zoom for plainiff Bracelino Continental Corp.
Aaron Ver (415)344-7110 of Perkins Coie appearing for defendant Good Post, LLC

Discussed. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DENFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. 10 days to answer.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)
